heading: Sunday Night
text: Becoming windy. Chance of rain showers; some freezing rain possible east, and in far northern NY.
temperature: Low to mid 30s north, mid to upper 30s south, rising late

heading: Monday
text: Some early freezing rain possible east, otherwise windy with showers likely.
temperature: Upper 50s to mid 60s west, mid 50s to around 60 east

heading: Tuesday
temperature: Upper 20s to mid 30s, steady or falling

heading: Wednesday
temperature: Mid 20s to lower 30s north, mainly low to mid 30s south
